title: Cute Romantic Japanese Anime Illustration Young Couple
sourceTitle: Cute Romantic Japanese Anime Illustration Young Couple

imagePrompts.prompt:
Cute romantic Japanese anime illustration of a young couple kissing on a traditional Kyoto-style street during golden hour, cozy spring atmosphere, detailed wooden Japanese shops with authentic Japanese kanji signs and lanterns, sakura cherry blossom trees glowing in sunset light, warm cinematic lighting, cobblestone pathway, countryside mountains in the background, vibrant flower pots, pastel sky, nostalgic slice-of-life anime aesthetic.
The girl wears a soft pink floral dress with long brown hair and tiny sakura hairpins, while the boy wears a light blue oversized shirt and beige pants, holding her gently in a romantic pose. Traditional storefronts feature handwritten Japanese text, ramen shop banners, tea house signs, candy shop menus, glowing lanterns with kanji, vending machines, and small street decorations for an authentic Japan vibe.
Highly detailed environment, Studio Ghibli-inspired textures, Makoto Shinkai cinematic lighting, dreamy watercolor anime style, soft glowing particles, romantic emotional atmosphere, ultra detailed foliage and architecture, hand-painted anime illustration, wholesome love story aesthetic, vibrant warm tones, storybook composition, vertical artwork.m the Japan
